title: On the geometry of isomonodromic deformations on the torus and the elliptic Calogero-Moser system
summary: We consider isomonodromic deformations of connections with a simple pole on the torus, motivated by the elliptic version of the sixth Painlevé equation. We establish an extended symmetry, complementing known results. The Calogero-Moser system in its elliptic version is shown to fit nicely in the geometric framework, the extended symplectic two-form is introduced and shown to be closed.
